title: Dr. Beckmann Hob & Stainless Steel Cleaner | Quick-clean ultra-shine finish | 250 ml
features: For quick and easy everyday cleaning
Specialist cleaner to reliably remove grease, dirt, water stains and even fingerprints
With a fresh orange & lemon scent
Suitable for all hob types (glass ceramic, gas, induction)
description: Product Description Dr. Beckmann Gloss Hob & Stainless Steel Cleaner is specially developed for the glossy and streak-free cleaning of all types of hob and stainless steel surfaces. Formulated with Special surfactants to dissolve grease and dirt, while gloss and care components leave a long-lasting shine. Perfect for quick and easy cleaning everyday or as required and provides a streak-free shine compared to cleaning with other surface sprays. Versatile cleaner suitable for all types of hobs (including glass ceramic, inductions and gas stoves) and all stainless steel surfaces. HOW TO USE IT: First remove heavy encrustations on the hob with a hob scraper. 1. Spray on cold surface. Leave to work. 2. Clean with a damp cloth. Remove moisture with a seperate clean dry cloth. IMPORTANT INFORMATION: - Always follow the manufacturer's manual. ECO CONTRIBUTION: -Biodegradable formula - Recyclable bottle (without cap & labels) - With plant based ingredients - Made with 100 % renewable electricity Ingredients / Directions HOW TO USE IT: First remove heavy encrustations on the hob with a hob scraper. 1. Spray on cold surface. Leave to work. 2. Clean with a damp cloth. Remove moisture with a seperate clean dry cloth.
